title: add EnvironmentFile support (Quadlet)
body:
currently (at least form the documentation file it seems) on the Environment= is supported but not the EnvironmentFile= which would be very useful (we can't use it without it). 
thnaks.

comments.body: Shouldn't be hard to add, but you could probably achieve the result with PodmanArgs=--env-file YourFile
Moving to Podman, since quadlet has been merged.
